posts.author: khudson (Kathleen Hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Request to add ‘business days’ in the drop down menu:

Our organization wants our week to start on Sunday. Oftentimes, there are Friday due dates. I have several automations where if the due date passed, an alert is triggered the next day- which could fall on a Saturday. I don’t want to have to create automations specifically for Fridays or long weekend holidays. Any suggestions?

posts.author: Brent.s (Brent Sjoberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Similar to this request, our accounting team sets deadlines by days of the month, which requires the use of “business days”. As an example accounts payable cutoff might recur 2 business days in the month; every month. Any feature updates, ideas or workarounds would be appreciated!

Just using “days” ends up with due dates on weekends, etc. which does not work.

I agree with the originator of this request that simply allowing a determination of what your business days equal would allow for this setting to work.
